description: Pulse-echo bond-ring comparison: GOOD BOND vs DISBOND. Each half: skin/adhesive/doubler cross-section with 0-degree probe on top, A-scan below. Left trace draws fast-decaying skin multiples + decay envelope + drain arrows through adhesive; right has air gap at skin-adhesive interface, trace draws long persistent ring, trapped-energy bounce in free skin, SKIN THICKNESS spacing bracket.
